title: Oportun Financial Corp (OPRT) Q3 2023 Earnings
text: Oportun reported a 7% YoY increase in revenue, reaching a record $268 million for Q3 2023. Despite this top-line growth, the company posted a net loss of $21 million, though this represented significant improvement compared to the $106 million loss in the prior-year quarter. Diluted earnings per share declined to $(0.55), compared to $(3.21) in Q3 2022. Adjusted EBITDA improved substantially to $16 million, reversing from a $6.2 million loss in the year-ago period. Membership grew by 13% YoY to 2.1 million. Products increased by 14% YoY to 2.3 million. Operating expenses fell to $123 million, the lowest in two years. However, originations declined significantly, dropping 24% to $483 million. The managed principal balance decreased 4% year-over-year to $3.23 billion. Management announced cost-reduction initiatives targeting quarterly run rate expenses by the end of 2024 at $105 million. The company secured two new personal loan financing agreements worth up to $267 million to support growth initiatives.
